howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to your new salon

step1.title: Browse
step1.description: Explore our catalog of beauty salons available in Bangkok, filter by district, type and budget.

step2.title: Contact
step2.description: Get in direct touch with the seller via WhatsApp, LINE or email. We facilitate every exchange.

step3.title: Visit
step3.description: Arrange an on-site visit, discover the salon and finalize your acquisition with confidence.

about.title: About SiamLuxe
about.subtitle: Your gateway to beauty investment in Bangkok
about.missionText: SiamLuxe connects international investors with the best beauty salon opportunities in Bangkok. Our multilingual team supports you from discovery to finalizing your acquisition.
about.whyBangkokText: Bangkok is the world capital of wellness. With over 22 million tourists per year and a thriving expat community, the demand for premium beauty services continues to grow.

lotusSection.title: Salons that generate revenue from day one
lotusSection.body: Loyal clientele, premium location, proven profitability. Our salons are handpicked for their potential — you take over a running business, not a project to build from scratch.
